page_desc: Mafi kyawun sabis na imel na ɗan lokaci. Kare sirrin ku kuma guji saƙonnin da ba ku buƙata tare da adiresoshin imel amintattu. Ba a buƙatar rajista.
welcome_msg: Barka da zuwa Temp Mail King!
no_new_msg: Ba ku da sababbin saƙonni a halin yanzu.
duplicate_email_error: Adireshi ya riga ya kasance a cikin ɗakin karatu! Gwada Prefix na Imel daban-daban.
delete_confirm: Shin kun tabbata kuna son share wannan akwatin saƙon?
copy_email_success: An yi nasarar kwafin hanyar kunnawa da sauri
copy_password_success: An yi nasarar kwafin kalmar sirri
privacy_content:
• Ba ma adana saƙonnin dindindin; Ana share su ta atomatik bayan ɗan gajeren lokaci.
  • Ba ma neman kowane bayanan sirri ko gabobin don ƙirƙirar imel.
  • An tsara sabis ɗin don kare sirrin ku daga spam.
  • Ta amfani da rukunin yanar gizon, kun yarda da goge bayanan atomatik kowane awa 24.
faq_content:
Har yaushe saƙon ya ƙare?

Yana ci gaba da aiki muddin mai binciken yana buɗewa, kuma ana share ɗakin karatu kowane sa'o'i 24 don tabbatar da keɓantawa.

Zan iya maido da share imel?

A'a, da zarar an share ta atomatik ko da hannu, ba za a iya dawo da bayanai ba har abada.

Shin sabis ɗin kyauta ne?

Ee, sabis ɗin yana da cikakkiyar kyauta kuma yana goyan bayan tallace-tallace masu sauƙi don tabbatar da ci gaba da aiki.

Me yasa bana samun wasu sakonni?

Tabbatar da sabunta akwatin saƙon saƙon. Wasu rukunin yanar gizon na iya toshe yankunan wucin gadi; gwada canza yankin daga lissafin.

Ta yaya zan kare asusuna na hukuma?

Yi amfani da imel ɗin mu na ɗan lokaci don yin rajista akan rukunin yanar gizo marasa amana don kare babban imel ɗinku daga hacking da spam.
privacy_policy_content:
• Ba ma adana saƙonnin dindindin; Ana share su ta atomatik bayan ɗan gajeren lokaci.
  • Ba ma neman kowane bayanan sirri ko gabobin don ƙirƙirar imel.
  • An tsara sabis ɗin don kare sirrin ku daga spam.
  • Ta amfani da rukunin yanar gizon, kun yarda da goge bayanan atomatik kowane awa 24.
no_messages: Babu saƙon da ya shigo tukunna
unknown_sender: Wanda ya aiko ba a sani ba
email_taken_error: Yi haƙuri, an riga an yi amfani da wannan sunan
inbox_full_desc: Kun karɓi matsakaicin adadin saƙonni. Don tsaro, da fatan za a ƙirƙiri sabon imel don karɓar ƙarin saƙonni.
